title: Console
excerpt: description: Supported methods of the `console` API in Cloudflare Workers image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The `console` object provides a set of methods to help you emit logs, warnings, and debug code. All standard [methods of the console API ↗](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/console) are present on the `console` object in Workers.
